# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    parameters {
        string(name: 'BUILD_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "Default build command"', description: 'Enter your custom build command here')
        string(name: 'TEST_SCRIPT', defaultValue: 'echo "Default test script"', description: 'Enter your custom test script here')
        string(name: 'DEPLOYMENT_STEPS', defaultValue: 'echo "Default deployment steps"', description: 'Enter your custom deployment commands here')
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                sh params.BUILD_COMMAND
            }
        }
        
        stage('Testing') {
            steps {
                sh params.TEST_SCRIPT
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deployment') {
            steps {
                sh params.DEPLOYMENT_STEPS
            }
        }
    }
}
